implementation_summary.summary: CP00-847 extends the descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace domain bridge through ReviewGate tail, AppPermission, and relationship-map head without opening runtime marketplace behavior.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-847 RP28.P01.M04.S07-RP28.P01.M06.S04 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

review_adjudication.p3_disposition: CP847-P3-01 is closed by running the full validation suite after queue regeneration and before commit; command-evidence records the suite at exit 0.
